name: Perfect Distraction
description: You use clever tactics to mislead your foes as you sneak away. You while leaving a decoy behind. The decoy acts as the spell , though you aren't , just . You can continue to concentrate to move your decoy, as with the spell, whether or not you remain throughout the duration. Once you use Perfect Distraction, you need to spend 10 minutes to set up another decoy before you can use it again.
